title: Mekanism Tools: Simply Swords
description: Add Simply Swords weapons for every Mekanism Tools material in Minecraft 1.20.1 Forge, complete with matching recipes, Better Combat attributes, and Mekanism-styled recolor textures.
body:
![Mod Banner](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1560/17/screenshot-2026-03-01-112911-png.png)

# Mekanism Tools x Simply Swords (Forge 1.20.1)

Bring **Simply Swords**’ weapon variety to **Mekanism Tools** materials — with full **Forge 1.20.1** support.

This mod adds missing Simply Swords weapon variants for Mekanism Tools materials, including item registration, recipes, and Better Combat attributes where applicable.

***

## ✅ What’s Included

### Materials Supported

*   Bronze
*   Lapis Lazuli
*   Osmium
*   Refined Glowstone
*   Refined Obsidian
*   Steel

### Weapon Types Added (Simply Swords Set)

*   Longsword
*   Twinblade
*   Rapier
*   Katana
*   Sai
*   Spear
*   Glaive
*   Warglaive
*   Cutlass
*   Claymore
*   Greataxe
*   Greathammer
*   Chakram
*   Scythe
*   Halberd

***

## ⚔️ Better Combat Compatibility

Weapon attributes are provided for weapon types that Simply Swords defines attributes for.  
_(Scythes follow Simply Swords’ behavior and do not include weapon attribute data.)_

***

## 📦 Requirements

You must have **both** installed:

*   Mekanism Tools
*   Simply Swords

***

## 🎨 Textures (Work-in-Progress)

The current textures are **not final** — they’re generated to match the **palette and general style** of vanilla Mekanism Tools.

If you’d like to help improve/replace textures, feel free to friend me on Discord: **`rollylindenshnizzer_`**
